title: boneful [BTA]
description: BTA mod that makes stone tools require bones in craft!
body:
# BONEFUL
### This mod changes textures and recipes for stone tools. Now they require bones in craft!
(Wow so wild, so hardcore)
That's it.

![Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fee40f12fc2c05d4b820ca6947fe9788fb7e7316.png)
